name: Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Cream together the margarine and sugar replacement until smooth.
4. Add eggs and beat well.
5. Beat in the cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
6. Sift together the flour, baking soda, powder, and salt.
7. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture alternately with the water, stirring after each addition.
8. Stir in the sour cream, raisins, and nuts.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let cool completely before serving.
Recipe yields 18 servings @ 124 calories per serving Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread; 1 fat
